title: Great Central Railway East Leake branch: Transport and Works Act order
body: "Application by Great Central Railway (Nottingham) Limited for approval to extend its existing operations to provide a fine dining heritage railway experience from Ruddington, past Rushcliffe Halt, to a scenic vantage point at Stanford Viaduct.  Application details  The application is being made under the Transport and Works Act 1992.   order: The Great Central (East Leake Branch, etc.) application status: live application date of application: 1 December 2025 applicant: Great Central Railway (Nottingham) Limited via Winckworth Sherwood  "
